response.global_analysis: 1. Song & Version Match: The performance is the English version of the song 'HIT ME UP' by Takane Lui, Mori Calliope, and Hakos Baelz. 2. Reference Lyrics Deviation: The reference JSON provided Korean lyrics for the original version; we discarded them and performed 100% manual transcription of the English version's lyrics. 3. Dialogue Segment: Transcribed the post-performance talk segment manually, accurately capturing all multilingual elements (including Mori Calliope's Japanese introduction) and referencing the song 'Ifuudoudou' correctly. 4. Timing & Pacing: Kept subtitles tightly aligned with vocal boundaries to prevent cascading delays.
